title: Aztralli
shortDesc: Aztralli is an African online marketplace connecting buyers, wholesalers, and sellers with secure escrow payments and delivery services.
longDesc: Aztralli is a digital e-commerce platform built to help African businesses and consumers trade efficiently online. The platform connects verified wholesalers and retailers in a secure ecosystem, enabling seamless buying, selling, and delivery while integrating escrow-based payment protection and real-time logistics support.

title: X Mineral
shortDesc: A modern landing page for a mineral exploration and mining company showcasing services, resources, and industry expertise.
longDesc: X Mineral is a corporate website designed to present a mineral exploration and mining company. The platform highlights the company's expertise in mineral resource exploration, mining operations, and sustainable extraction practices. It includes sections for company overview, services, projects, and contact information, providing potential investors and partners with insights into the organization’s capabilities and operations in the mining industry.

title: Laycons
shortDesc: Laycons is a personal creative portfolio showcasing web design and development work.
longDesc: Laycons serves as a digital portfolio platform highlighting personal projects, UI/UX design work, and development case studies to attract collaborators and clients.

title: Code Learners Hub
shortDesc: An online learning platform offering curated courses in web development and programming.
longDesc: Code Learners Hub provides a platform to learn, collaborate, and validate skills through curated courses. It has over 15k students taught and more than 12 years of combined tutor experience, offering guidance in Full Stack C#, Python, and JavaScript web development.

title: Kamdun
shortDesc: Kamdun presents tech solutions and digital services for modern businesses.
longDesc: Kamdun is a tech-focused portfolio site showcasing digital solutions and services aimed at helping businesses grow their online presence and leverage technology for performance and market reach.

title: My Portfolio
shortDesc: showcases my work and let others know about me. It's like an evergreen platform for my projects, case studies, and information about me.
longDesc: It provides a convenient way for potential clients to view my work while also allowing me to expand on my skills and services. This, however, isn’t the ultimate purpose of my portfolio website. The ultimate purpose of my portfolio website is to provide a way for me to land more clients, whether that means freelance work, more clients for my agency or employment at a company.

title: Atlaxa
shortDesc: Atlaxa is an e-commerce marketplace promoting authentic African goods and entrepreneurial growth.
longDesc: Atlaxa is a dynamic online marketplace that connects African artisans, manufacturers, and entrepreneurs with global buyers. The platform showcases locally made products across categories such as fashion, crafts, home decor, and art, empowering local businesses to reach wider markets and promote African creativity globally. Atlaxa is designed to support economic growth and trade expansion for small and medium enterprises.

title: Oddience
shortDesc: Oddience makes it easy for professionals to launch and scale their private practice.
longDesc: Oddience empowers professionals with instant business and booking pages that include global payments and conferencing features to help them grow their practice efficiently.

title: FGNIEP
shortDesc: Federal Government of Nigeria IPPIS Enrollment Portal
longDesc: The FGNIEP is a system that captures enrollment data for IPPIS employees, including bio-data, financial records, service history, and biometric information.

title: Jalsa Registration Portal
shortDesc: Ahmadiyya Muslim Jama'at Nigeria(AMJN) Jalsa Salana Registration Portal
longDesc: It is a website where Ahmadiyya Muslim Jama'at Nigeria (AMJN) members and their guest(s) can register to attend the annual Jalsa Salana event.
